C[arnfasta: I'm looking at whether to go H11 or K11 first after J11 or push first with G9.
arnfasta: I think I can go W:G9, B:H9, W:H8 cut, B:J8 cut, W:H7. I'd be trying to take territory in the bottom right and the F8 group but sacrificing/making the center white group more vulnerable
arnfasta: I don't think that's worth it
arnfasta: I could try and do: W:G9, H9,H8, J9, then go K8. Black would likely take with H7 and I could turn it into a Ko with J7.
arnfasta: J7 would just have black push. Which would be fine because i could connect with H7 but it leaves the J10 group too vulnerable
arnfasta: :x looks like my numbering is off.  But I'm trying to push from F9, cut, and then try to strengthen the J9/10 group
arnfasta: and surround the F8 group
arnfasta: Womp. None of that works because I was forgetting the J11 stone that I'm anticipating will be there
arnfasta: I think I want to try for a trade.  B:J11, W:H11,B:G11, W:K11, B:J12,K12, B:H12, W:G12, B:H11, W:K13
arnfasta: there's a couple variations I'm reading there but that is the most complicated I'm able to read
